summary: MX exposes one public HTTP integration surface, the MX Platform API (REST, docs at https://docs.mx.com/api-reference/platform-api/reference/mx-platform-api), authenticated with either Bearer auth or Basic auth, plus related MX APIs (Batch over SFTP, Data Enhancement Off Platform via `MD-API-KEY` + `client_id`, Nexus via `MD-SESSION-TOKEN`, and SSO/OAuth flows via MX-issued registrations/tokens) as recorded.
